SelectedDataBind.SQL: SELECT fot.Ident ,fol.[Name] FROM dbo.Folder AS fol INNER JOIN dbo.FolderTree AS fot ON fot.FolderID = fol.ID WHERE fot.Ident = @ITSMCompanyIdent

DataBind.SQL:
DECLARE @PermissionIDs dbo.ListNVarchar100Type; INSERT INTO @PermissionIDs VALUES ('ITSMAuthor'), ('ITSMOperator');
DECLARE @OperatorOnlyPermissionIDs dbo.ListNVarchar100Type; INSERT INTO @OperatorOnlyPermissionIDs VALUES ('ITSMOperator');
IF(@ReporterAccountID IS NULL OR @ReporterAccountID = @UserID)
SELECT itsmFolPer.FolderTreeIdent AS Ident ,itsmFolPer.FolderName AS [Name] FROM usr.ITSM_GetAllowedFolderTreeByAccountAndPermissionAndSegmentType(@UserID,@FolderGroupSegmentIdent,'{{FormIdent}}Segment',@PermissionIDs) as itsmFolPer WHERE itsmFolPer.FolderLevel = @Level AND itsmFolPer.ParentFolderTreeIdent = @ITSMCompanyIdent AND itsmFolPer.FolderState = @FolderActiveState
UNION
SELECT fot.Ident, fol.[Name] FROM dbo.FolderTree AS fot INNER JOIN dbo.Folder AS fol ON fol.ID = fot.FolderID INNER JOIN dbo.FolderTree AS fotP ON fotP.ID = fot.ParentFolderTreeID AND fotP.Ident = @ITSMCompanyIdent WHERE fot.Ident = @ITSMCategoryLevel2Ident
ELSE
SELECT itsmFolPer.FolderTreeIdent AS Ident ,itsmFolPer.FolderName AS [Name] FROM usr.ITSM_GetAllowedFolderTreeByAccountAndPermissionAndSegmentType(@UserID,@FolderGroupSegmentIdent,'{{FormIdent}}Segment',@OperatorOnlyPermissionIDs) as itsmFolPer INNER JOIN usr.ITSM_GetAllowedFolderTreeByAccountAndPermissionAndSegmentType(@ReporterAccountID,@FolderGroupSegmentIdent,'{{FormIdent}}Segment',@PermissionIDs) as itsmFolPerReporter ON itsmFolPerReporter.FolderTreeID = itsmFolPer.FolderTreeID WHERE itsmFolPer.FolderLevel = @Level AND itsmFolPer.ParentFolderTreeIdent = @ITSMCompanyIdent AND itsmFolPer.FolderState = @FolderActiveState
UNION
SELECT fot.Ident, fol.[Name] FROM dbo.FolderTree AS fot INNER JOIN dbo.Folder AS fol ON fol.ID = fot.FolderID INNER JOIN dbo.FolderTree AS fotP ON fotP.ID = fot.ParentFolderTreeID AND fotP.Ident = @ITSMCompanyIdent WHERE fot.Ident = @ITSMCategoryLevel2Ident

DECLARE @PermissionIDs dbo.ListNVarchar100Type; INSERT INTO @PermissionIDs VALUES ('ITSMAuthor'), ('ITSMOperator');
DECLARE @OperatorOnlyPermissionIDs dbo.ListNVarchar100Type; INSERT INTO @OperatorOnlyPermissionIDs VALUES ('ITSMOperator');
IF(@ReporterAccountID IS NULL OR @ReporterAccountID = @UserID)
SELECT itsmFolPer.FolderTreeIdent AS Ident ,itsmFolPer.FolderName AS [Name] FROM usr.ITSM_GetAllowedFolderTreeByAccountAndPermissionAndSegmentType(@UserID,@FolderGroupSegmentIdent,'{{FormIdent}}Segment',@PermissionIDs) as itsmFolPer WHERE itsmFolPer.FolderLevel = @Level AND itsmFolPer.ParentFolderTreeIdent = @ITSMCategoryLevel2Ident AND itsmFolPer.FolderState = @FolderActiveState
UNION
SELECT fot.Ident, fol.[Name] FROM dbo.FolderTree AS fot INNER JOIN dbo.Folder AS fol ON fol.ID = fot.FolderID INNER JOIN dbo.FolderTree AS fotP ON fotP.ID = fot.ParentFolderTreeID AND fotP.Ident = @ITSMCategoryLevel2Ident WHERE fot.Ident = @ITSMCategoryLevel3Ident
ELSE
SELECT itsmFolPer.FolderTreeIdent AS Ident ,itsmFolPer.FolderName AS [Name] FROM usr.ITSM_GetAllowedFolderTreeByAccountAndPermissionAndSegmentType(@UserID,@FolderGroupSegmentIdent,'{{FormIdent}}Segment',@OperatorOnlyPermissionIDs) as itsmFolPer INNER JOIN usr.ITSM_GetAllowedFolderTreeByAccountAndPermissionAndSegmentType(@ReporterAccountID,@FolderGroupSegmentIdent,'{{FormIdent}}Segment',@PermissionIDs) as itsmFolPerReporter ON itsmFolPerReporter.FolderTreeID = itsmFolPer.FolderTreeID WHERE itsmFolPer.FolderLevel = @Level AND itsmFolPer.ParentFolderTreeIdent = @ITSMCategoryLevel2Ident AND itsmFolPer.FolderState = @FolderActiveState
UNION
SELECT fot.Ident, fol.[Name] FROM dbo.FolderTree AS fot INNER JOIN dbo.Folder AS fol ON fol.ID = fot.FolderID INNER JOIN dbo.FolderTree AS fotP ON fotP.ID = fot.ParentFolderTreeID AND fotP.Ident = @ITSMCategoryLevel2Ident WHERE fot.Ident = @ITSMCategoryLevel3Ident

DECLARE @PermissionIDs dbo.ListNVarchar100Type; INSERT INTO @PermissionIDs VALUES ('ITSMAuthor'), ('ITSMOperator');
DECLARE @OperatorOnlyPermissionIDs dbo.ListNVarchar100Type; INSERT INTO @OperatorOnlyPermissionIDs VALUES ('ITSMOperator');
IF(@ReporterAccountID IS NULL OR @ReporterAccountID = @UserID)
SELECT itsmFolPer.FolderTreeIdent AS Ident ,itsmFolPer.FolderName AS [Name] FROM usr.ITSM_GetAllowedFolderTreeByAccountAndPermissionAndSegmentType(@UserID,@FolderGroupSegmentIdent,'{{FormIdent}}Segment',@PermissionIDs) as itsmFolPer WHERE itsmFolPer.FolderLevel = @Level AND itsmFolPer.ParentFolderTreeIdent = @ITSMCategoryLevel3Ident AND itsmFolPer.FolderState = @FolderActiveState
UNION
SELECT fot.Ident, fol.[Name] FROM dbo.FolderTree AS fot INNER JOIN dbo.Folder AS fol ON fol.ID = fot.FolderID INNER JOIN dbo.FolderTree AS fotP ON fotP.ID = fot.ParentFolderTreeID AND fotP.Ident = @ITSMCategoryLevel3Ident WHERE fot.Ident = @ITSMCategoryLevel4Ident
ELSE
SELECT itsmFolPer.FolderTreeIdent AS Ident ,itsmFolPer.FolderName AS [Name] FROM usr.ITSM_GetAllowedFolderTreeByAccountAndPermissionAndSegmentType(@UserID,@FolderGroupSegmentIdent,'{{FormIdent}}Segment',@OperatorOnlyPermissionIDs) as itsmFolPer INNER JOIN usr.ITSM_GetAllowedFolderTreeByAccountAndPermissionAndSegmentType(@ReporterAccountID,@FolderGroupSegmentIdent,'{{FormIdent}}Segment',@PermissionIDs) as itsmFolPerReporter ON itsmFolPerReporter.FolderTreeID = itsmFolPer.FolderTreeID WHERE itsmFolPer.FolderLevel = @Level AND itsmFolPer.ParentFolderTreeIdent = @ITSMCategoryLevel3Ident AND itsmFolPer.FolderState = @FolderActiveState
UNION
SELECT fot.Ident, fol.[Name] FROM dbo.FolderTree AS fot INNER JOIN dbo.Folder AS fol ON fol.ID = fot.FolderID INNER JOIN dbo.FolderTree AS fotP ON fotP.ID = fot.ParentFolderTreeID AND fotP.Ident = @ITSMCategoryLevel3Ident WHERE fot.Ident = @ITSMCategoryLevel4Ident

DECLARE @PermissionIDs dbo.ListNVarchar100Type; INSERT INTO @PermissionIDs VALUES ('ITSMAuthor'), ('ITSMOperator');
DECLARE @OperatorOnlyPermissionIDs dbo.ListNVarchar100Type; INSERT INTO @OperatorOnlyPermissionIDs VALUES ('ITSMOperator');
IF(@ReporterAccountID IS NULL OR @ReporterAccountID = @UserID)
SELECT itsmFolPer.FolderTreeIdent AS Ident ,itsmFolPer.FolderName AS [Name] FROM usr.ITSM_GetAllowedFolderTreeByAccountAndPermissionAndSegmentType(@UserID,@FolderGroupSegmentIdent,'{{FormIdent}}Segment',@PermissionIDs) as itsmFolPer WHERE itsmFolPer.FolderLevel = @Level AND itsmFolPer.ParentFolderTreeIdent = @ITSMCategoryLevel4Ident AND itsmFolPer.FolderState = @FolderActiveState
UNION
SELECT fot.Ident, fol.[Name] FROM dbo.FolderTree AS fot INNER JOIN dbo.Folder AS fol ON fol.ID = fot.FolderID INNER JOIN dbo.FolderTree AS fotP ON fotP.ID = fot.ParentFolderTreeID AND fotP.Ident = @ITSMCategoryLevel4Ident WHERE fot.Ident = @ITSMCategoryLevel5Ident
ELSE
SELECT itsmFolPer.FolderTreeIdent AS Ident ,itsmFolPer.FolderName AS [Name] FROM usr.ITSM_GetAllowedFolderTreeByAccountAndPermissionAndSegmentType(@UserID,@FolderGroupSegmentIdent,'{{FormIdent}}Segment',@OperatorOnlyPermissionIDs) as itsmFolPer INNER JOIN usr.ITSM_GetAllowedFolderTreeByAccountAndPermissionAndSegmentType(@ReporterAccountID,@FolderGroupSegmentIdent,'{{FormIdent}}Segment',@PermissionIDs) as itsmFolPerReporter ON itsmFolPerReporter.FolderTreeID = itsmFolPer.FolderTreeID WHERE itsmFolPer.FolderLevel = @Level AND itsmFolPer.ParentFolderTreeIdent = @ITSMCategoryLevel4Ident AND itsmFolPer.FolderState = @FolderActiveState
UNION
SELECT fot.Ident, fol.[Name] FROM dbo.FolderTree AS fot INNER JOIN dbo.Folder AS fol ON fol.ID = fot.FolderID INNER JOIN dbo.FolderTree AS fotP ON fotP.ID = fot.ParentFolderTreeID AND fotP.Ident = @ITSMCategoryLevel4Ident WHERE fot.Ident = @ITSMCategoryLevel5Ident

DECLARE @PermissionIDs dbo.ListNVarchar100Type; INSERT INTO @PermissionIDs VALUES ('ITSMAuthor'), ('ITSMOperator');
SELECT IIF( EXISTS( SELECT NULL FROM usr.ITSM_GetAllowedFolderTreeByAccountAndPermissionAndSegmentType(@UserID,@FolderGroupSegmentIdent,'{{FormIdent}}Segment',@PermissionIDs) WHERE FolderLevel = @Level AND ParentFolderTreeIdent = @ITSMCategoryLevel2Ident ) , 1 , 0 ) AS IsShowCategoryLevel3

DECLARE @PermissionIDs dbo.ListNVarchar100Type; INSERT INTO @PermissionIDs VALUES ('ITSMAuthor'), ('ITSMOperator');
SELECT IIF( EXISTS( SELECT NULL FROM usr.ITSM_GetAllowedFolderTreeByAccountAndPermissionAndSegmentType(@UserID,@FolderGroupSegmentIdent,'{{FormIdent}}Segment',@PermissionIDs) WHERE FolderLevel = @Level AND ParentFolderTreeIdent = @ITSMCategoryLevel3Ident ) , 1 , 0 ) AS IsShowCategoryLevel4

DECLARE @PermissionIDs dbo.ListNVarchar100Type; INSERT INTO @PermissionIDs VALUES ('ITSMAuthor'), ('ITSMOperator');
SELECT IIF( EXISTS( SELECT NULL FROM usr.ITSM_GetAllowedFolderTreeByAccountAndPermissionAndSegmentType(@UserID,@FolderGroupSegmentIdent,'{{FormIdent}}Segment',@PermissionIDs) WHERE FolderLevel = @Level AND ParentFolderTreeIdent = @ITSMCategoryLevel4Ident ) , 1 , 0 ) AS IsShowCategoryLevel5

DECLARE @PermissionIDs dbo.ListNVarchar100Type; INSERT INTO @PermissionIDs VALUES ('ITSMOperator');
/*DECLARE @LastITSMCategoryIdent VARCHAR(900) = COALESCE(@ITSMCategoryLevel5Ident, @ITSMCategoryLevel4Ident, @ITSMCategoryLevel3Ident, @ITSMCategoryLevel2Ident, @ITSMCompanyIdent)*/ DECLARE @LastITSMCategoryIdent VARCHAR(900) = @ITSMCategoryLevel2Ident; IF @IsShowCategoryLevel3 = 1 SET @LastITSMCategoryIdent = @ITSMCategoryLevel3Ident IF @IsShowCategoryLevel4 = 1 SET @LastITSMCategoryIdent = @ITSMCategoryLevel4Ident IF @IsShowCategoryLevel5 = 1 SET @LastITSMCategoryIdent = @ITSMCategoryLevel5Ident
IF @IsElevatedPermissionOrNotFirstState IS NULL SET @LastITSMCategoryIdent = COALESCE(@ITSMCategoryLevel5Ident, @ITSMCategoryLevel4Ident, @ITSMCategoryLevel3Ident, @ITSMCategoryLevel2Ident, @ITSMCompanyIdent)
IF @LastITSMCategoryIdent IS NULL
SELECT @IsElevatedPermissionOrNotFirstState AS IsElevatedPermissionOrNotFirstState
ELSE
SELECT IIF( EXISTS( SELECT NULL FROM usr.ITSM_GetAllowedFolderTreeByAccountAndPermissionAndSegmentType(@UserID,@FolderGroupSegmentIdent,'{{FormIdent}}Segment',@PermissionIDs) WHERE FolderTreeIdent = @LastITSMCategoryIdent ) OR ISNULL(@ID, 0) != 0 , 1, 0) AS IsElevatedPermissionOrNotFirstState

dsf:From.dsf:SQL: LEFT JOIN usr.ITSM_FolderTreeView AS ftvCat2 ON ftvCat2.FolderTreeIdent = itsm.ITSMCategoryLevel2Ident
LEFT JOIN usr.ITSM_FolderTreeView AS ftvCat3 ON ftvCat3.FolderTreeIdent = itsm.ITSMCategoryLevel3Ident
LEFT JOIN usr.ITSM_FolderTreeView AS ftvCat4 ON ftvCat4.FolderTreeIdent = itsm.ITSMCategoryLevel4Ident
LEFT JOIN usr.ITSM_FolderTreeView AS ftvCat5 ON ftvCat5.FolderTreeIdent = itsm.ITSMCategoryLevel5Ident

DataBind.SQL:
DECLARE @PermissionIDs dbo.ListNVarchar100Type; INSERT INTO @PermissionIDs VALUES ('ITSMAuthor'), ('ITSMOperator');
SELECT itsmFolPer.FolderTreeIdent AS Ident , itsmFolPer.FolderName AS [Name] FROM usr.ITSM_GetAllowedFolderTreeByAccountAndPermissionAndSegmentType(@UserID,@FolderGroupSegmentIdent,'{{FormIdent}}Segment',@PermissionIDs) as itsmFolPer WHERE itsmFolPer.FolderLevel = @Level AND itsmFolPer.FolderName LIKE @ITSMCompanyIdent

SelectedDataBind.SQL: SELECT fot.Ident , fol.[Name] FROM dbo.Folder AS fol INNER JOIN dbo.FolderTree AS fot ON fot.FolderID = fol.ID WHERE fot.Ident = @ITSMCompanyIdent

DataBind.SQL:
DECLARE @PermissionIDs dbo.ListNVarchar100Type; INSERT INTO @PermissionIDs VALUES ('ITSMAuthor'), ('ITSMOperator');
SELECT itsmFolPer.FolderTreeIdent AS Ident , itsmFolPer.FolderName AS [Name] FROM usr.ITSM_GetAllowedFolderTreeByAccountAndPermissionAndSegmentType(@UserID,@FolderGroupSegmentIdent,'{{FormIdent}}Segment',@PermissionIDs) as itsmFolPer WHERE itsmFolPer.FolderLevel = @Level AND itsmFolPer.ParentFolderTreeIdent = @ITSMCompanyIdent

DECLARE @PermissionIDs dbo.ListNVarchar100Type; INSERT INTO @PermissionIDs VALUES ('ITSMAuthor'), ('ITSMOperator');
SELECT itsmFolPer.FolderTreeIdent AS Ident , itsmFolPer.FolderName AS [Name] FROM usr.ITSM_GetAllowedFolderTreeByAccountAndPermissionAndSegmentType(@UserID,@FolderGroupSegmentIdent,'{{FormIdent}}Segment',@PermissionIDs) as itsmFolPer WHERE itsmFolPer.FolderLevel = @Level AND itsmFolPer.ParentFolderTreeIdent = @ITSMCategoryLevel2Ident

DECLARE @PermissionIDs dbo.ListNVarchar100Type; INSERT INTO @PermissionIDs VALUES ('ITSMAuthor'), ('ITSMOperator');
SELECT itsmFolPer.FolderTreeIdent AS Ident , itsmFolPer.FolderName AS [Name] FROM usr.ITSM_GetAllowedFolderTreeByAccountAndPermissionAndSegmentType(@UserID,@FolderGroupSegmentIdent,'{{FormIdent}}Segment',@PermissionIDs) as itsmFolPer WHERE itsmFolPer.FolderLevel = @Level AND itsmFolPer.ParentFolderTreeIdent = @ITSMCategoryLevel3Ident

DECLARE @PermissionIDs dbo.ListNVarchar100Type; INSERT INTO @PermissionIDs VALUES ('ITSMAuthor'), ('ITSMOperator');
SELECT itsmFolPer.FolderTreeIdent AS Ident , itsmFolPer.FolderName AS [Name] FROM usr.ITSM_GetAllowedFolderTreeByAccountAndPermissionAndSegmentType(@UserID,@FolderGroupSegmentIdent,'{{FormIdent}}Segment',@PermissionIDs) as itsmFolPer WHERE itsmFolPer.FolderLevel = @Level AND itsmFolPer.ParentFolderTreeIdent = @ITSMCategoryLevel4Ident
